person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate from manual DynamicPropertySource configuration to Spring Boot 3.2+ @ServiceConnection annotation for Testcontainers.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error, the intent is to adopt the new Spring Boot 3.2 feature that simplifies test container configuration, replacing the verbose manual property registration which is no longer the recommended pattern.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add import for the new @ServiceConnection annotation.
Remove unused imports related to the removed DynamicPropertySource configuration.
Enable a previously commented-out test method.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Lombok dependency to a newer version.
Update the Hoverfly Java JUnit5 dependency to a newer version.
Update the Jib Maven Plugin to a newer version.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit scope to instancio-junit dependency.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency for modern test container integration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a newline at the end of the pom.xml file to comply with POSIX standards.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Update the Docker image for the 'analyze' job to use OpenJDK 21 instead of OpenJDK 19.
Remove the custom 'jdk' executor definition that used OpenJDK 19, as it is no longer referenced.
Add a new 'machine_executor_amd64' executor using Ubuntu 22.04 to support native Docker-in-Docker or specific system requirements for Java 21 tests.
.circleci/config.yml.after:
executors:
  machine_executor_amd64:
    machine:
      image: ubuntu-2204:2023.10.1
    environment:
      architecture: "amd64"
      platform: "linux/amd64"

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Add a new 'test' job that installs OpenJDK 21 via apt-get on the machine executor and runs Maven tests.
.circleci/config.yml.after:
test:
    executor: machine_executor_amd64
    steps:
      - checkout
      - run:
          name: Install OpenJDK 21
          command: |
            java -version
            sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install openjdk-21-jdk
            sudo update-alternatives --set java /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64/bin/java
            sudo update-alternatives --set javac /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64/bin/javac
            java -version
            export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
      - run:
          name: Maven Tests
          command: mvn test

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Remove the 'tcc' (testcontainers-cloud) orb import as it is no longer used in the workflow.
Update the workflow to use the new 'test' job instead of the old 'maven/test' job with the 'jdk' executor and testcontainers context.
.circleci/config.yml.before:
- maven/test:
          executor: jdk
          context: Testcontainers
          pre-steps:
            - tcc/setup
